feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Advanced Intercompany Sales - VCM
entry.content: Can anyone tell me why the billing document still pending, and supplier invoice is partially processed while all invoices are created successfully and posted.

entry.title: This document cannot be deleted Message no. V1006
entry.content:
HI Expert

Fire Urgent Please

I canceled my Sale Invoice and PGI, and then I came back with my Sales OrderVA02 but the system does not allow me to delete the Sales Order and line item on the Sales Order. The system is response currently restricting the deletion of the line item in the Sales Order

When I am deleting the Sales Order or Line item in sale order its giving a message like this "

1st Sales Order Deleting Message :This document cannot be deleted Message no. V1006

2nd Sales Order Line Item Deleting Message: For reason of cost management, Item 000010 cannot be Deleted Message no. V1128

 Maintained MRP1 MRP Type ND/PD Both and MRP3, Strategy Group 10/20
Sales Order Type Domestic Dealer Sales

Can anyone explain me about this and can give me solution how to delete this Sales Order or Line item please??

 

 

Thanks 
M.G Rabbani

entry.title: VBOF sap rebates agreement
entry.content:
Hi expert

I have a main list of rebates agreement   

I would like to know if there is any tips to identify the agreements  without VBOF run.

entry.title: How is the currency for Statistical value for foreign trade determined?
entry.content:
How is the currency (EIPO-GRWCU) for (Statistical value for foreign trade) for EIKP-GRWR determined?

In our sales documents and invoices when we look at the Conditions we always see GRWR in EUR. However on the export data (EIKP/EIPO) it's converted to CHF.

We want this value in EIPO to be in the local (document) currency (EUR).

entry.title: Domestic Revue GL should be Changed to Export Revenue GL after Buyon certificate submission in Vf01
entry.content:
Hi All

We have a scenario. system should flip the GL from Export GL to Domestic GL during VF01 and after Buyon certificate is submitted by customer the initial Domestic GL should flip back to Export GL.
Here are the conditions

1. Inco Term= EXW and Plant is from SA but customer is from other than SA.

1. First system should flip the revenue from Export to Domestic Rev GL-- This is achieved using ENH we are flipping the Acc assign cat of customer from 02(Export) to
01-Domestic revenue.

2. After some time may be 1 month or maximum 90 days customer submit the Buyan certificate then Company gives the credit note back to Customer for the Tax levied in the first step.

by creating the credit memo- this is also ok

3. after submitting the Buyon certificate we also need to flip the initial accounting entry created in step1 i.e. Domestic Revue GL should be Changed to Export Revenue GL.

Not sure whether we can flip the already saved GL in database table to another GL If not what shall be the other alternative approach to achieve this.

Thanks

entry.title: Mass Change Active Materials Type - All materials ROH - FERT
entry.content:
This is a what if question. I think it's totally insane to do. But I don't make those decisions.

If you think about doing a mass change to your material master and I mean all of your materials.   

How long do you think it will take?

Can it be done?

Will the history be kept?

The background:
We have a limited amount of materials 8,371 - material plant combinations.  We are trying to inactivate/delete what we don't use.  That's a project going on now.  We were mid-flight on an upgrade / that is on-hold now.  The upgrade would move us to 2022 I believe.

We are using all of OTC, all of BTC, all of PTP but we do not have the WM level only the IM.

We use process orders only - no production orders.   Yes, weird.

We have a custom programs, enhancement points, BAPI, BADI, Gateway, CDS, FIORI....  You get the picture.   Around 9000.  I can do the scope for these.   It would take me quite a bit of time.

We have been on SAP since late 1990s.    4.6C to HANA 1709.   All on-premise except for our analytics.   We have several third party products and APIs to all of them.   I would have to call them each individually.

Our consultants are saying it would be done by  the end of the year.   I am saying reimplementation and then I don't even know if it could be done because of the history.  (That's a gut feel and it would take at least an year in my opinion )

Has anyone successfully done this?   Time-line?  Yes we have all kind of transactions against these materials going on - all of the time.

Any information would be helpful.   It's hard for me to get over my mental block of don't do it.

Thank you!

Michelle

Oh yeah - no idea what area to put this one in.   It covers all of them.

entry.title: SD: Use price from certain MM-info-record as sales price
entry.content:
Dear gurus,

 

we would like to use the purchase price of a material as the sales price. We do NOT use IS Retail. Details:

  • We would like to use condition type PR01.
  • We would like to have the system add that condition type automatically in sales order item in VA01.
  • We would like to find the correct sales price by looking up the default info-record for the material from the source list. Then we would like to use the purchase price maintained in that info record.

Questions:

  • There is no standard way to do this, correct?
  • We think we need to create a formular for condition value in VOFM. Correct?
  • Does anyone have any example code on this?
  • But that will not insert PR01 in VA01 automatically, correct?

Thanks
Jens

entry.title: Copy control routine to copy ship to party your reference
entry.content:
I create standard order and maintain values in field Ship to party "Your Reference" (VBKD-IHREZ_E) , with reference to it I create standard delivery and with reference to delivery I create standard invoice, with reference to standard invoice I create return order I want a VTAF copy control routine to copy Ship to party "Your Reference" (VBKD-IHREZ_E) field from standard order into return order Ship to party "Your Reference" (VBKD-IHREZ_E) field

Or is there any other way please suggest earliest!

entry.title: Prevent billing doc creation when vbrk & vbrp records are available based on a condition
entry.content:
We are looking to stop billing document creation for a delivery after checking VBRK-NETWR and VBRP-NETWR (so we need XVBRK, XVBRP and XKOMV internal tables to be populated for our requirement), if condition is not satisfied stop billing doc creation in VF06 / VF04 / VF01.

We tried couple of user exits but nothing was helpful to stop the billing document creation.

Could you please recommend a condition/setting to stop the billing document creation if condition is not met  and which user exit would be  an appropriate place to handle it ?

entry.title: SD Manage Sales document Flexible Workflow - Customer return
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community , 

I'm facing an issue with Fiori App "Manage Sales document Workflow" when creating Customer return workflow (screenshot below) , could you please help me figure out the issue .

Also , In the same App , I can't find Free of charge Workflow in the drop list (screenshot below)  could you please help me

entry.title: order BOM explode in a sales order line
entry.content:
hi everyone I want to ask a question about order bom.

1.I create an sales order item with item category TAP (which means the pricing at line-item level)

2.I create the corresponding order-bom with T-code: CS61

I want to explode the order-bom in the sales order line. how to do with it. where is the re-load of the BOM in sales order line? because I go back to sales order line, the components are not displayed in structure tabpage.

thanks!

or can you tell me, for SAP standard solution, is it true that bom explode in sales order is only useful for material bom NOT order-BOM?

entry.title: My inbox - Flexible workflow Sales documents are not visible
entry.content:
Dear SAP community , 

I have configured sales documents flexible workflow, everythign is set , sales document is in approval in SAP GUI (screenshot below) but nothing is showing my inbox fiori app . could you please help solve this problem  

Thanks !

entry.title: VL10G in ECC showing Line item but in S4 Hana sales order line item not showing
entry.content:
Hi All

In ECC it is showing the line items of the sales order shown below

However in S4 Hana it is NOT showing the line item wise. Even in the change layout checked. anything  we need to do so it will display like in ECC or in S4 hana has restricted this.

Thanks

entry.title: Overall status of sales order (IC -CTAD) showing irrevalent even after applying reason of rejection.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Good Day.!

We are unable to keep overall status of sales order as completed after applying reason for rejection for item category CTAD. Once applying reason for rejection sale order overall status has become “Not relevant” instead of” completed”. PFA attached document for reference.

Thanks and regards,

Akash Kadam

entry.title: Item category for a release sales order with reference to a contract with milestone billing plan
entry.content:
Hello Guys

Please help me. Which item category should a release sales order have when referred to a quantitative contract with billing plan , TAO item category.

I have 3 dates in the billing plan, 01.10.2024, 01.11.2024 and 01.12.2024.

I want to use the sales order to deliver and bill the first line, for entire quantity.

Thank you

entry.title: Combine FWSD from TM with a SD order in one invoice
entry.content:
My client, who is an LSP with operations from both TM (FWO) and SD, want to merge both services into a single invoice document.

When I create an FWO, the FWSD settlement document generates the invoice directly in SD, preventing the creation of a consolidated invoice with another document, as can be done in VF04 with multiple SD orders. 

Is there a standard mechanism that allows me to achieve this goal?

entry.title: how to use LT0G
entry.content: what is LT0G transaction meant for ?

entry.title: OBD DATE CAN CHANGE
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Can we change the OBD date at table level?

entry.title: Complex Customer Hierarchy
entry.content:
Our company is transitioning from three separate CRMs systems to SAP. Currently, we have duplicate customer records across these CRMs because each system is used for different product ranges.

The initial plan is to maintain these duplicate/triplicate customer accounts in SAP, as each account, though representing the same entity, often has different payers, delivery addresses, and assigned sales representatives. However, we're exploring if a more structured approach is possible.

Example of our customer structure: 

We sell products to various schools under the New York City Department of Education through different contracts. In our CRMs, each school isn't treated as a single entity; instead, different departments within the same school are handled as separate entities. 

For example:

  1. The science department of a high school purchases lab equipment and is billed separately.
  2. The athletic department of the same high school also buys from us but is treated as a distinct entity.

Ideally, we'd like to structure our customer hierarchy in SAP as follows:

  1. Parent Account: New York City Department of Education
  2. Child Accounts: Individual Schools
  3. Sub-Child Accounts: Departments within each school (e.g., Science Department, Athletic Department)

Questions are:

  1. Is it possible to create this hierarchical structure in SAP? Who in the example would be created as a business partner? In my eyes the department of education and each school would be Business partners, then each department would be created as a child of each school?
  2. If that's true, can each child and sub-child account have its own:
    • Sales representative
    • Payer
    • Delivery address
    • Other unique attributes

entry.title: SD - Incompletion procedure trigger before entering material
entry.content:
Hello SAPiens ,

Is there any way to trigger SD incompletion procedure in sales document before entering material . 

My scenario is : payment methode (in header accounting tab) needs to be filled before entering material because i have a condition type that depends on the payment methode . I have set incompletion procedure but it only gets triggered after entering material (when i save the document) , so i am obliged to update conditions everytime .

Could you please help me on that . thank you !
